panels.title: Top |Lighter-Pyth| divergence per symbol (last 5min mean & std)
panels.description: For each stock, mean and std of Lighter-Pyth basis over the last 5min. High mean = persistent mispricing. High std = volatile divergence (mean-reversion candidate).

targets.rawSql: WITH l AS (SELECT timestamp, symbol, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML','SNDK','MRVL') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), p AS (SELECT timestamp, symbol, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML','SNDK','MRVL') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), j AS (SELECT l.symbol, (l.mid - p.mid)/p.mid*10000 bp FROM l ASOF JOIN p ON symbol) SELECT symbol, count() ticks, round(avg(bp),2) mean_bp, round(stddev_samp(bp),2) std_bp, round(min(bp),2) min_bp, round(max(bp),2) max_bp, round(abs(avg(bp)),2) abs_mean FROM j GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY abs_mean DESC

panels.title: Top |Lighter-Gate| divergence per symbol (5min)
panels.description: Lighter perp vs Gate perp — same instrument on two perp DEXes. Persistent gap = sustained arb opportunity if both venues are tradeable.

targets.rawSql: WITH l AS (SELECT timestamp, symbol sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), g AS (SELECT timestamp, replace(replace(symbol,'_USDT',''),'X','') sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDAX_USDT','TSLAX_USDT','AAPLX_USDT','AMZNX_USDT','MSFT_USDT','METAX_USDT','GOOGLX_USDT','AMD_USDT','MU_USDT','INTC_USDT','SPYX_USDT','QQQX_USDT','ORCLX_USDT','ASML_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), j AS (SELECT l.sym, (l.mid - g.mid)/g.mid*10000 bp FROM l ASOF JOIN g ON sym) SELECT sym, count() ticks, round(avg(bp),2) mean_bp, round(stddev_samp(bp),2) std_bp, round(min(bp),2) min_bp, round(max(bp),2) max_bp, round(abs(avg(bp)),2) abs_mean FROM j GROUP BY sym ORDER BY abs_mean DESC
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='NVDA' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='NVDAX_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pyth" FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='NVDA' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
